text: Delivered platform FMA, beta=0 GEMM assign stores, and register-tiled assign-only SYRK. Focused JVM/JS tests plus testAll, parityTest, and benchCompile green. Directional JDK25 JMH: dot 0.97x, gemm 1.04x, gemmTall 1.05x, AtA stabilizes ~2.5x Breeze; axpy remains ~0.63x. Final quiet two-fork evidence remains part of the QR arc.
